creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

I'm trying to find out what the state of the problem you reported in
ports/125324 [1] is. Are you still seeing the problem with an up-to-date
ports tree?

Please note that the port editors/the does not have a maintainer. Can you
provide a patch for the port that contains the changes you propose?

Regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/125324
